acceptance_criteria.criterion: Root `AGENTS.md` is a short navigation map, not a long-form manual; it clearly points agents to the deeper repo sources of truth and stays scoped to durable routing/invariant guidance rather than duplicating the full repository knowledge base.

proof.details: Root map remains short and routing-oriented.
Shows links from AGENTS.md to docs/index.md, docs/repo-map.md, and the deeper indexed docs.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: `docs/` is the canonical knowledge store for the repository, with indexed and discoverable entries for architecture, product sense, design, reliability, security, deployment, generated schema, design docs, product specs, and exec plans.

proof.details: Declares docs/ as the repository knowledge system of record and catalogs the docs tree.
Contains the current sorted docs file list plus the contents of docs/index.md and docs/repo-map.md.
Shows docs/index.md and system-of-record references in the root docs.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The repository has an explicit file-and-domain map that lets an agent quickly find the major code areas, supporting docs, and operational surfaces without reading unrelated files first.

proof.details: Dedicated file-and-domain map covering runtime domains, browser surface, tests, deployment, docs, and skills.
Contains the current contents of docs/repo-map.md.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The documentation structure reflects progressive disclosure from the OpenAI article: stable entrypoint first, then indexed deep links, then domain-specific docs and versioned plans/tech-debt artifacts.

proof.details: Structured with stable entry points, indexed subtrees, and reading order.
Adds an explicit progressive-disclosure reading section.
Shows progressive-disclosure references in AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and DESIGN.md.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Any ambiguity about `agent.md` is resolved consistently in the repo and spec: the existing `AGENTS.md` remains the root map, and no separate `agent.md` file is introduced unless a concrete repo need is proven.

proof.details: Spec resolves ambiguity in favor of AGENTS.md.
Current repo root map remains AGENTS.md.
No separate agent.md candidate found at repo root or near-root.

commands: git diff --check -- AGENTS.md ARCHITECTURE.md docs/index.md docs/repo-map.md docs/design-docs/index.md docs/product-specs/index.md docs/PLANS.md docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md
rg -n "docs/index.md|docs/repo-map.md|system of record|root map|progressive disclosure" AGENTS.md ARCHITECTURE.md docs
git diff --stat -- AGENTS.md ARCHITECTURE.md docs/index.md docs/repo-map.md docs/design-docs/index.md docs/product-specs/index.md docs/PLANS.md docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md
notes: This task is a documentation and navigation refactor; no runtime code or integration behavior was modified.
docs/index.md and docs/repo-map.md are part of the current repository state and appear as untracked files in git status because this evidence pass does not stage or commit changes.
